collection_method.limitation_note: Google Play metadata reports 2160 reviews, but the API returned 5000 review records. The metadata field likely represents a subset; extracted the full target count.

cleaning_decisions: Removed duplicate reviews by review_id and duplicate cleaned text.
Removed empty reviews and reviews with blank content.
Removed reviews with fewer than 3 words after cleaning.
Converted numbers to text using num2words.
Removed punctuation, special characters, and emojis using regex normalization.
Removed English stop words (NLTK stopwords corpus).
